chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6030 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on Misc. No.25480/2021 2. For hearing of main case 07.03.2025 Mr. Zia-ul-Hassan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Arif advocate holds brief for Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel for the petitioner the petition is pressed to the extent that the application made to the Collector of Customs, MCC Appraisement (East), dated 14.12.2020, available at page 47, be decided expeditiously after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
